# Sidhu Legal — Personal Injury Lawyer Strathcona County

> Sidhu Legal is a personal injury law firm serving Strathcona County, Sherwood Park, and the greater Edmonton area. Services include car accident claims, slip and fall, catastrophic injuries, dog bites, pedestrian accidents, and truck accidents. Free consultations, contingency fee — you don't pay unless we win.

## Contact
- Phone: (780) 666-0134
- Email: info@ngsidhu.com
- Website: https://injury-lawyer-edmonton.com/strathcona-county-personal-injury-lawyer/

## Services
- Car Accident Claims
- Slip and Fall
- Dog Bites & Animal Attacks
- Pedestrian Accidents
- Truck & Commercial Vehicle Accidents
- Catastrophic & Spinal Injury

## Languages
English, Punjabi, Hindi

## Jurisdiction
Alberta, Canada
